latestLead.pageText: Download App Contact us English العربية বাংলা Deutsch Español Français Indonesia Italiano 日本語 한국어 Melayu Filipino Português ภาษาไทย Việt Nam 繁体 اردو Login Markets Markets Forex Metals Energies Indices Stocks Markets Commodities Bonds ETFs Cryptos Trading Platforms FBS Platform MT4 MT5 Comparison Accounts Cent Zero Pro Premium Pricing Deposits & Withdrawals Swap-Free Trading Investing Copy Trading Become a Follower Become a Provider Tools & Education Tools VPS Hosting Autochartist Advanced Insights Premium Trader Trading Calculators All Tools Economic Calendar Earnings Calendar Promotions Company Company About us Why choose us Security of Funds Company 2 Contact Us Social Responsibility Login Register Markets Markets Forex Metals Energies Indices Stocks Markets Commodities Bonds ETFs Cryptos Trading Platforms FBS Platform MT4 MT5 Comparison Accounts Cent Zero Pro Premium Pricing Deposits & Withdrawals Swap-Free Trading Investing Copy Trading Become a Follower Become a Provider Tools & Education Tools VPS Hosting Autochartist Advanced Insights Premium Trader Trading Calculators All Tools Economic Calendar Earnings Calendar Promotions Company Company About us Why choose us Security of Funds Company 2 Contact Us Social Responsibility Register Login The world’s most popular instruments at your fingertips Trade online wherever you are with the FBS App. Scan to Download FBS App in the App Store Scan to Download FBS App in the Google Play Store Download MetaTrader 5 for PC Platforms Download MetaTrader 5 Enjoy more features with FBS MT5 Platform Download for Windows Download for Mac The FBS MT5 platform takes all the best features of the MetaTrader 5 and adapts them to fit the needs of the FBS client who wishes to master the markets, no matter what their style or preferred trading asset. This powerful but user-friendly platform offers more features, advanced trading tools, superior support and total control of your trades for an enhanced trading experience. Get the best start to your efficient trading of the markets with one of the most innovative and popular trading platforms in the world. The FBS MT5 Terminal offers more tools than ever before: 21 different timeframes Superior analysis tools Trade all the FBS asset classes View up to 100 charts simultaneously Hedging allowed One Click Trading Built-in Economic Calendar 80+ technical indicators OPEN AN ACCOUNT DOWNLOAD OPEN A DEMO ACCOUNT Advantages & Benefits Full access to your account and order history Complete control of your trades at all times Enhanced order management capabilities Set Stop Loss and Take Profit levels Also available for browsers and mobile devices How to install 1 Download the platform here. 2 Run the .exe file 3 Log in to your FBS MT5 account How to uninstall 1 Go to Start menu 2 Find your MT5 application in the list 3 Right click on it and select Uninstall User Guide on how to connect to the FBS MT5 Platform Servers User Guide on how to download the FBS MT5 Platform on a Mac Find us on Download FBS APP Contact us +44-203 097 85 71 Live Support Markets Forex Commodities Metals Bonds Energies ETFs Indices Cryptos Stocks Trading FBS Platform Comparison Cent Zero Pro Premium Deposits & Withdrawals Investing Copy Trading Become a Follower Become a Provider Tools & Education Autochartist Advanced Insights Premium Trader Traders' Board Trading Calculators All Tools Online Trading Courses Educational Videos Company About us Why choose us Promotions Security of Funds Social Responsibility FBS Live Support Please fill in the form to start the chat. First Name: Last Name: Email: Phone Number: Continue Hello How can we help you today? Please select Live chat is not available at the moment please try again later Thank you for contacting us! Our Live Chat is currently not available. Please leave us a message and one of our representatives will contact you as soon as possible. Your Message Send Thank you for your message! We will get back to you as soon as possible. Back Live chat is not available at the moment please try again later | Cookies Risk Warning: Trading Leveraged Products such as Forex and Derivatives may not be suitable for all investors as they carry a high degree of risk to your capital. Please ensure that you fully understand the risks involved, taking into account your investments objectives and level of experience, before trading, and if necessary, seek independent advice. Please read the full Risk Disclosure. FBS does not offer services to residents of certain jurisdictions, including the USA, Canada, Sudan, Syria, Iran, North Korea and others. Copyright © 2025 - All Rights Reserved
